creator: tatsuki_makino@hotmail.com
text:
I'm curious about this too.
Hashes in the same repository are guaranteed to never collide, but they will collide with hashes in other repositories in other projects, and that can even happen early on.

But I feel like it's no longer something we should be concerned about, since some updates like www/firefox have already been repeatedly updated with the same file name and updated distinfo.
The contents of the MASTER_SITE_BACKUP are already in such a mess that there is no problem even if we dispose of old files :)
